title: Some parameters can't be overridden with -G{name}={val}
body:
I have the file ```params.v``` with the parameter named ```Param_A``` set there.

The Verilog code uses this parameter ok, but an attempt to override it from the command line fails:
```
%Error: Parameters from the command line were not found in the design: Param_A
```

On the other hand, other parameters can be overridden from the command line successfully.
code_blocks: %Error: Parameters from the command line were not found in the design: Param_A
